channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Wed, 08 Jul 2026 14:21:51 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Egypt has uncovered a well-preserved 1,600-year-old Byzantine-era city in Dakhla Oasis: Homes, basilica church, ovens, coins and writing fragments show how people lived in the western desert
item.description: Egypt has unveiled remarkable archaeological discoveries that shed light on its rich historical heritage. Among these is a remarkably preserved Byzantine-era city located in the western desert, which reveals fascinating details about urban life and development during that time. Additionally, the recent unearthing of eighteen ancient tombs near Alexandria enhances the region's archaeological narrative, aiming to invigorate Egypt's crucial tourism industry.
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: Paris Hilton is celebrating the closure of a 55-year-old school in Utah: Inside her long-time battle against the boarding school and why
item.description: Provo Canyon School's Utah campus license was revoked due to health and safety violations. Paris Hilton celebrated the closure, having endured abuse at the institution years ago. The school's owners are considering legal options while the department monitors student transitions. This action follows years of advocacy by Hilton and others against such facilities. The troubled-teen industry faces increased scrutiny and regulatory efforts nationwide.
item.dc:creator: TOI News Desk

item.title: A robot army is heading to Greenland for a mission scientists once thought was impossible
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: Pakistan sets conditions as UK explores ways to deport grooming gang ringleader Shabir Ahmed
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Where did the universe's oldest star clusters come from? A new study has an answer
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: Australia generates so much solar power that it is giving away free electricity to households for 3 hours
item.dc:creator: TOI Science Desk

item.title: US court dismisses charges against Indian-origin doctor in Tesla cliff crash case
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 2 killed as Russia bombs Ukraine ahead of Zelenskyy-Trump Nato meet
item.description: The latest assault came just a day after one of the deadliest Russian attacks on Kyiv in recent months claimed 30 lives. The renewed strikes underscored Moscow's continuing pressure on Ukraine even as Nato leaders prepared to discuss military support, regional security and the future course of the war. Ukraine's State Emergency Service later said two people were wounded in the capital.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Quote of the day by Mother Teresa: "The greatest disease is not TB or leprosy, it is being…" - her timeless words on loneliness, love and human connection
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: How a giant meteor strike created Ghana's Lake Bosumtwi and its rich gold deposits
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Is Connor Murphy dead or alive? What we know about the viral rumor surrounding the YouTube bodybuilder
item.description: Connor Murphy’s reported death remains an unconfirmed rumor as of July 2026. Claims circulating online largely stem from social media posts and statements that have not been independently verified. No family member, representative, or authority has confirmed his death. Murphy rose to fame through fitness and bodybuilding content, and questions about his current status remain unanswered pending official information.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: 'I was testing people': Trump says he was 'very disappointed' with Nato over Iran war
item.description: Admitting that he was "very disappointed" with the alliance, Trump claimed some Nato members refused to support key US military objectives, deepening an already strained relationship with several European leaders. The remarks came ahead of the Nato leaders' summit in Ankara, where Trump met Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan. Speaking to reporters, the US President said the Iran conflict confirmed his long-held doubts about whether Nato allies would back the United States when it needed them most.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 9 policemen killed in terrorist attack in Balochistan
Nato showcases big arms deals as Trump sulks
"Truth will win": Candace Owens mocks Erika Kirk's tears as Tyler Robinson hearing begins in Utah
item.description: Candace Owens criticized the Tyler Robinson hearing as it began in Utah, calling it a "show trial" and questioning the prosecution's evidence. She mocked Charlie Kirk's widow, Erika Kirk, and accused her supporters of pushing an emotional narrative. Prosecutors presented DNA evidence, witness testimony and video related to Charlie Kirk's 2025 killing. Judge Tony Graf will decide whether the case has enough evidence to proceed to trial.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: What happened to Sur Ronster? Team shares update after e-bike YouTuber’s shocking Ultra Bee crash
item.description: Sur Ronster is recovering after what his team called the worst crash of his career while testing a Sur Ron Ultra Bee e-bike. The update came through his official TikTok account, which confirmed he can read fans’ comments while recovering. No injury details or return date have been released. The news comes months after his Sydney Harbour Bridge controversy.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Mizkif releases “Emiru Lied, Part 1” video presenting evidence amid defamation lawsuit
item.description: Streamer Mizkif shared his side of a legal dispute with Emiru. He presented messages and conversations to support his claims in the lawsuit. Mizkif addressed allegations about their past relationship and subsequent interactions. He also discussed claims of him trying to follow Emiru after their breakup. The legal battle between the two streamers continues with new information emerging.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Kai Cenat’s first stream in nine months tops 1 million viewers with Streamer University 2026 reveal
item.description: Kai Cenat returned to livestreaming after a nine-month break, drawing millions of excited fans. His comeback stream simultaneously broadcast on Twitch and YouTube, a first for the popular streamer. The event successfully revealed the professors and students for the upcoming Streamer University 2026 program. Over one million viewers tuned in live across both platforms, showcasing his immense popularity.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: ‘Streaming makes me the worst’: JiDion quits Kick streaming after viral arrest forces major self-reflection
item.description: JiDion, whose real name is Jidon Armani Adams, says he is quitting streaming after his June 22 arrest outside a McDonald’s in Woodhaven, Michigan. In a new YouTube video, he called the incident a wake-up call and said streaming brought out the worst in him. Adams plans to stop livestreaming and focus on predator-catching content instead.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy
